svg.title: official-1444-reconstruction-v2 — hre
svg.desc: Deterministic M25 review: provinces, ownership, hierarchy, uncertainty, historical constraints with georeferencing control points and residuals, focus insets, and forbidden modern outlines as negative controls.
svg.text: forbidden modern outline (negative control; excluded from framing)
inset frame on the main map
vector-substring-wgs84 @ EPSG:4326; max residual 1.509 km ≤ budget 6 km
negative control: modern outline vs 1444 provinces
